description: Generate an ATAC-seq analysis workflow bash script: Tn5 offset correction (alignmentSieve --ATACshift), normalized coverage (bamCoverage RPGC), fragment-size analysis (bamPEFragmentSize), and peak-centered matrix + heatmap (computeMatrix, plotHeatmap).
rules: read-only — emits a bash script template; never runs deepTools or touches sequencing data
ATAC_BAM is the aligned ATAC-seq BAM; PEAKS_BED is optional peak regions
all vars optional — unset ones use the generator's safe defaults
filenames are sanitized (no shell metacharacters, no '..' segments) before interpolation
--ATACshift filters to properly paired fragments and is equivalent to --shift 4 -5 5 -4
usage: Optionally set ATAC_BAM, PEAKS_BED, GENOME_SIZE, THREADS. Output: atacseq.sh (a customizable bash workflow to review and run separately).
limitation: Produces a template script only. Running it requires deepTools 3.5.6 and samtools installed. The peak matrix/heatmap step is skipped at runtime if PEAKS_BED does not exist. Paths must satisfy the sanitizer pattern [A-Za-z0-9._/-].
